html:
Exclusive to:

The Magician's Chest is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Maxwell from 1 Silk, 4 Boards, and 9 Nightmare Fuel.

The Magician's Chest let the characters access to the Shadow Dimension, which has an inventory of 12 slots. In addition, things can be put into and taken from the shadow dimension through other Magician's Chests, the Magician's Top Hat and Shadow Chester. Edible items in the shadow dimension rot 1.5 times faster. The Magician's Chest cannot store irreplaceable items, like the Celestial Orb. If the container is destroyed, the items remain inside the shadow dimension. In order to gain access to them again, a player must build another container to access to the shadow dimension. There is only one shadow dimension per server: one on the Surface, one in Caves (due to Caves being a separate server).

Unlike the Magician's Top Hat, the Magician's Chest can be used by all characters.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Proof of Purchase Nightmarish Magician's Chest skin is obtained by purchasing the Maxwell Youtooz.
Proof of Purchase / Resurrected
Nightmarish Magician's Chest
This devious depository can only be the work of dark magic.

"magician_chest"
“Why am I starting to feel a bit uneasy...?”
–Wilson
“What do you think would happen if I threw a lit match inside?”
–Willow
“Is little disappearing box.”
–Wolfgang
“You can't use a magic box for hide-and-seek, that's cheating.”
–Wendy
“IF ONLY DATA COULD TRAVEL SO EASILY. THE CHAOS THAT COULD BE WROUGHT”
–WX-78
“I must admit, I find his renewed interest in the Codex... unsettling.”
–Wickerbottom
“It sure beats international shipping.”
–Woodie
“If you're worried about getting stuck inside, don't rummage through my things.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a wicked löoking thing.”
–Wigfrid
“Could we borrow it for hide-and-seek?”
–Webber
“Are you certain that whatever you put in there will come back?”
–Warly
“Magic box”
–Wormwood
“I dunno if I want to stick my hand in there.”
–Winona
“A clever trick to transport things quick.”
–Wortox
“Magic hidey-place.”
–Wurt
“C'mon Woby, just a little peek inside?”
–Walter
“Oh, what a handy little pocket dimension!”
–Wanda
The Magician's Chest is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Maxwell from 1 Silk, 4 Boards, and 9 Nightmare Fuel.
The Magician's Chest let the characters access to the Shadow Dimension, which has an inventory of 12 slots. Edible items in the shadow dimension rot 1.5 times faster. The Magician's Chest cannot store irreplaceable items, like the Celestial Orb. If the container is destroyed, the items remain inside the shadow dimension. In order to gain access to them again, a player must build another container to access to the shadow dimension. There is only one shadow dimension per server: one on the Surface, one in Caves (due to Caves being a separate server).
Unlike the Magician's Top Hat, the Magician's Chest can be used by all characters.

THE CHAOS THAT COULD BE WROUGHT |wickerbottom = I must admit, I find his renewed interest in the Codex... unsettling. |woodie = It sure beats international shipping. |maxwell = If you're worried about getting stuck inside, don't rummage through my things. |wigfrid = 'Tis a wicked löoking thing. |webber = Could we borrow it for hide-and-seek? |winona = I dunno if I want to stick my hand in there. |warly = Are you certain that whatever you put in there will come back? |wortox = A clever trick to transport things quick. |wormwood = Magic box |wurt = Magic hidey-place. |walter = C'mon Woby, just a little peek inside? |wanda = Oh, what a handy little pocket dimension! |choose = maxwell}} The '''Magician's Chest''' is a craftable [[Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can only be crafted by [[Maxwell/DST|Maxwell]] from 1 [[Silk]], 4 [[Boards]], and 9 [[Nightmare Fuel]]. The Magician's Chest let the characters access to the [[Shadow Dimension]], which has an inventory of 12 slots. In addition, things can be put into and taken from the shadow dimension through other Magician's Chests, the [[Magician's Top Hat]] and [[Shadow Chester]]. Edible items in the shadow dimension rot 1.5 times faster. The Magician's Chest cannot store irreplaceable items, like the [[Celestial Orb]]. If the container is destroyed, the items remain inside the shadow dimension. In order to gain access to them again, a player must build another container to access to the shadow dimension. There is only one shadow dimension per server: one on the [[Surface World|Surface]], one in [[Caves]] (due to Caves being a separate server). Unlike the Magician's Top Hat, the Magician's Chest can be used by all characters. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Storage_Solutions_Skins|Belongings}} *The '''Proof of Purchase Nightmarish Magician's Chest''' skin is obtained by purchasing the Maxwell [[Youtooz]].
